caption:
Explore the largest library in the region! 

📍Mohammed Bin Rashid Library 

🕘 Timings:
Monday to Saturday: 9AM - 9PM
Friday: 2PM - 9PM
Sunday: closed

⚠️ Things to know before you go
* FREE entry, but you have to book in advance at mbrl.ae website 
* Wear appropriate clothing, shoulders & knees should be covered.
* Children below 5 years are not allowed to enter the library
* Nearest metro station: Creek (10 minutes walk)
